# Introduction {.unnumbered}

Some overview of extracellular electrophysiology.

This course will go into depth into the theory and implementation of each stage of an extracellular electrophysiological data pipeline. 

In this walkthrough, we will go over the entire pipeline from start-to-finish at a high level, introducing each processing stage. Then, over the next few chapters
we will flesh this out and add detail.

For an ground-up introduction to extracellular electrophysiohy, the stages
of the processing pipeline and the SpikeInterface package, please see below / link to slides.
